title: Niino 2 in 1 Fast Sling Puck & Tic TAC Toe Game board | Family Christmas Games | Christmas board games |Gift for Adults & Kids Children 20 Pucks
features: CAN BE FLIPPED TO A TIC TAC TOE – When flipped over, the board transforms into a TIC TAC TOE game. Idea for both adults and kids. An entertaining party game and great for some family bonding time.
STORAGE BAG: A high-quality bag also comes included to keep pucks safe and prevent them from getting damaged

HIGH-QUALITY WOOD MATERIAL – Our board game is made from high-quality, non-toxic solid wood materials that makes the board durable and safe. The wood is not treated with harmful chemicals and is thus suitable for human use and does not cause harm to children.
BENEFITS – Although a very fun game to play, this is a Fast-paced board game Improves reaction time child, fine motor skills and hand to eye coordination and encourages strategic thinking.
PERFECT GIFT IDEA FOR THE WHOLE FAMILY – Our 2 in 1 board game is the perfect gift idea for boys and girls, adults and kids, young and old.
description: How to play Sling Puck Place an equal number of Pucks on each side of the board Players take turns using the puck to pull back on the elastic band at each end of the board Release the pucks aiming for the hole in the centre of the board The first player to clear their side of the board wins! Tic Tac Toe Play occurs on a 3 by 3 grid of 9 empty squares Two players alternate marking empty squares, the first player marking Xs and the second player marking Os. The first player to place three of the same mark in a row wins! Endless Benefits Focus and Concentration Dexterity Hand to Eye ordination Fine Motor Skills Reaction Time Strategic Thinking Why buy our board 20 pucks instead of 10 Pouch for carrying the pucks Reinforced edges Steady, durable, and lightweight Can be easily carried on camping trips and weekends getaways Comes in a gift able bright and beautiful box
